name: Coop Pank AS
summary: Coop Pank AS, together with its subsidiaries, provides banking and financing solutions to private and business clients in Estonia. It operates through Corporate Banking, Retail Banking, Consumer Financing, Leasing, and Other segments. The company provides banking plans; saving accounts and deposits; small, car, home renovation, travel, home, refinancing, mortgage, working capital, investment, seasonal work, and apartment association loans; and payment, overdraft, guarantee, settlement, factoring, and leasing services, as well as debit and credit cards. It also provides Internet and mobile banking services; and real estate management services, as well as motor, comprehensive, travel, and home insurance; and small and medium business property, construction machinery, and other equipment insurance services. The company was formerly known as AS Eesti Krediidipank. Coop Pank AS was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Tallinn, the Republic of Estonia.
